title: kalimeris lautureana var. mongolica
intro: Kalimeris lautureana var. mongolica, also known as Mongolian Kalimeris, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Kalimeris lautureana var. mongolica is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can be used externally as a topical application or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
